scope: Protocol-91 demo transcript intake support for residual byte-for-byte replay evidence
checklist_row_supported: Commit at least one retail packet capture, protocol-91 demo transcript, or equivalent known-good capture fixture for byte-for-byte replay validation.

observed_contract: records begin with a little-endian int32 serverMessageSequence
records continue with a little-endian int32 payload length
payload bytes follow with packet sequencing bytes already skipped by CL_WriteDemoMessage
CL_ReadDemoMessage rejects payload lengths larger than MAX_MSGLEN

local_artifact_inventory.classification: local generated demos, not committed retail evidence
local_artifact_inventory.decision: do not commit binary demos; require JSON transcript with retail provenance before closing capture rows

parity_estimate.reason: The pass adds transcript intake tooling and does not add a retail packet/demo artifact.
